title: How I'd Become an AI Consultant If I Had To Start Over (2 Paths)

extracted.hook: I made $231,000 in 30 days as an AI consultant.
extracted.credential_drop: "My name's Nate. I'm a co-founder of True Horizon AI, an AI consultancy that helps business implement AI." (early)
transitions: "So, first things first, [music] what even is an AI consultant?"
"Now, I want to be super clear about this. When I say I made $231,000 in a month, the majority of that revenue came from my B TOC side."
"And here's the key. Most people reach out to me and they say the same thing. I know I need to start using AI, but I don't know how."
"So, let's start with path one, which is the B TOC route."
"Now, let's talk about path two, which is B2B, working with businesses directly."
extracted.cta: "If you enjoyed the video or you learned something new, please give it a like. It definitely helps me out a ton." (outro)
extracted.analogies: "Think of it like, you're not just handing them a pre-built workflow. You're helping them figure out what to build and why." (hook)
extracted.vulnerability: "I was working as a freelancer doing builds and consulting projects, helping companies figure out how to use AI in their own workflows. But over time, I started to realize that my biggest leverage was an education because I could help thousands of people learn how to do this for themselves." (early)

accelerate: "So, first things first, [music] what even is an AI consultant?"
"Now, I want to be super clear about this. When I say I made $231,000 in a month, the majority of that revenue came from my B TOC side."
slow: "So, let's break down the two main paths that you can take to make money as an AI consultant because I've done both. So, path one is B TOC, educating the market. Path two, B2B, working directly with businesses." (body)

frameworks: "The first step is to focus on problems, not tools. And this is the biggest mindset shift that you can make." (hook)
